scripts.build:shared: npm run build --workspace @infrastructure-as-words/contracts && npm run build --workspace @infrastructure-as-words/infra-config
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:api && npm run build:web && npm run build:infra
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules .cache packages/contracts/dist services/api/dist infra/config/dist web/.next web/out infra/terraform/.terraform infra/terraform/.generated packages/contracts/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo services/api/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo infra/config/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
scripts.lint: npm run build:shared && npm run lint:eslint && npm run lint:repo
scripts.lint:type: npm run build:shared && npm run lint:eslint:type && npm run lint:repo
scripts.lint:eslint: node ./scripts/run-eslint.mjs packages services infra web scripts tests
scripts.lint:eslint:type: node ./scripts/run-eslint.mjs --typed packages services infra web scripts tests
scripts.lint:repo: npm run lint:hooks && npm run lint:unused && npm run lint:line-budgets && npm run lint:package-imports
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b && npm run typecheck --workspace @infrastructure-as-words/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @infrastructure-as-words/infra
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test:node
scripts.precommit:checks: npm run lint:type && npm run validate:infra
scripts.check: npm run lint:type && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run validate:infra
